title: **🎭 {_bot_display_name} da Trickster**
description: Come 'ere and let da Ork Trickster rob ya... I mean, play and 'ave fun, humie.
canvas_trickster_overview_description: Look at all da wayz Putre can take yer gold.

canvas_trickster_subrole_descriptions.beggar: 🙏 **Loot Taker** - Askz for gold for da clan projects wiv creative liez
canvas_trickster_subrole_descriptions.dice_game: 🎲 **DA BIG POT** - Play 'gainst da house, toss da bonez and rob da pot!
canvas_trickster_subrole_descriptions.ring: 👁️ **Ring Hunter** - Accuse uvver gitz of carryin' da Shiny Ring
canvas_trickster_subrole_descriptions.nordic_runes: 🔮 **Old Runez** - Toss ancient bonez to see da future and get smart

dice_game.rankingvoid: No gitz on da board, humie!

dice_game.help:
**DA POT Help**
 Play {_bot_display_name}'z POT, bet gold and toss bonez to win! Uze `dice play` to start.
 If da humie getz three onez, 'e robz da POT!
dice_game.title: 💰 DA BIG POT 💰**
dice_game.current_balance: Gold in da POT right now:
dice_game.use_command: 💡 Uze `!dice play` to toss da skullz, flabby humie!
dice_game.no_prize: {combination} - ¡NAH! No loot for ya! More gold for da horde, beat it perdedor!
dice_game.error_servers_only: ¡GRRR! Diz move only workz in campz, stupid humie!
dice_game.error_game_unavailable: ¡BLEGH! Da bone game ain't ready in diz camp!
dice_game.error_database_access: ¡GRRR! Can't find da gold pile in da vault!
dice_game.announcements_on_description: Putre will yell when someone robz da pot

dice_game.dice_pot_value_description: Set how much gold startz in da pot

dice_game.dice_stats_description: See how much ya won or lost

dice_game.help_config: • `!dice config bet <amount>` (Boss only) - Set da price
dice_game.help_announcements: • `!dice config announcements on/off` (Boss only) - Turn yellin' on/off
dice_game.help_partial_info: • Small prizez come from da Boss's pile
dice_game.admin_description: Change da game and da yellin' settings
dice_game.help_sent_private: 📩 Dice help tossed to yer box.
dice_game.stats_sent_private: 📩 Yer mess sent to yer box.

dice_game.history_no_games: 📜 **LAST GAMES** - No one tossed bonez yet.
dice_game.error_private_message: ❌ Diz only workz in campz, not in private cavez.
dice_game.no_games_played: 🎲 **Ya didn't play yet!** - Uze `!dice play` to start!
dice_game.medium_pot: 📈 **Medium Pot** - Worth a toss now, humie!
dice_game.small_pot: 📉 **Small Pot** - Not many dead gitz yet, let it grow!
dice_game.dm_default_server_message: *Yerin' in a cave, uzin' da first camp I find.*
dice_game.dm_no_servers_available: ❌ No campz found. Go to a camp to toss bonez.
dice_game.dm_server_access_error: ❌ Can't reach da camp. Go dere and play.
dice_game.big_pot:
🔥 **DA POT IZ BURNIN' LIKE AN ELF VILLAGE!** 🔥
Dere'z **{balance:,}** gold coinz! Uze `!dice play` to rob it before Putre kickz ya! 🎲
dice_game.rules:
-**Three Eyez of GRUUMSH** 👁️ and ya take da **POT**!
 -Straight **(4,5,6)** multipliez bet **x5**! BLOODY RAID 🗡️ !
 - Get any **Three of a kind** 💀 and take **x3** yer bet.
 - A **Pair** of fangs 🐺 **getz yer gold back**.
dice_game.description: **Info:** Try yer luck wiv {_bot_display_name}'z POT! 🎲 Toss bonez 'gainst da house and take all da gold if ya can!

ring.title: 👁️ **PUTRE RING HUNTER** 👁️
ring.description: 🔍 Da hunter will chase ya till da end of time, accuse uvver gitz to save yer skin.
ring.status_active: ✅ **HUNT ON** - {_bot_display_name} iz lookin' for da shiny
ring.investigation_instructions:
• Uze **Ring: Accuse** from da menu
• Type: username
• Ya can also accuse while yappin' wiv {_bot_display_name}.
ring.investigation_warning:
⚠️ **IMPORTANT:**
• Don't accuse yerself, ya git
• Don't accuse bots, dey don't 'ave fingerz
• Da Boss must turn da hunt on first
ring.inactive_instructions:
To start da hunt:
• A Boss must go to **Ring Admin**
• Click **Ring: On** to wake Putre up
• Set da speed for lookin' at gitz

Once it'z on, ya can start snitchin'!
ring.controls:
**Knobz**
- Turn hunt on/off
- Change how fast I check gitz
ring.admin_description: Set up da hunt and how often I sniff da ring

dropdown.ring_accuse_description: Snitch on a git for carryin' da Shiny Ring

beggar.title: :coin: **PUTRE'Z LOOT BAG** :coin:
beggar.description:
{_bot_display_name} collectz gold for clan workz. Give gold now and Putre might say thanks.
 If yer lucky, I might give some back.
beggar.instructions:
- Click donate in da menu below.
 - Wait for da weekly loot count.
 - Toss any amount and Putre will remember ya.
beggar.no_donations: No giftz yet. Be da first to cough up gold!
beggar.beggar_donation_success: Thankz for da {amount} gold for da cause: {reason}! 🪙

dropdown.beggar_frequency_description: How often I ask for gold
dropdown.beggar_force_minigame_description: Make Putre ask for gold now

nordic_runes.title: **🔮 Putre - Old Runic Seer**
nordic_runes.description: Come 'ere and see yer fate wiv ancient nordik knowledge. Elder Futhark runez speak da truth for warriorz and orkz alike.
nordic_runes.available_readings:
- **Single Runa** (fast toss): Each rune iz a cosmic power, a nature force, or humie life thing.
 - **Three Runez** (past/present/future): Followz da nordik pattern: 'Urðr' (past), 'Verðandi' (what'z happenin'), and 'Skuld' (what must be).
 - **Five Runez Cross**: Advanced magic dat mapz humie life in five ways, like da nordik compass points. 
 - **Seven Runez Cross**: Da most powerful way, known as 'Yggdrasil Cross' for its link to da world tree.
nordic_runes.how_to_use:
**How to uze:**
 1. Pick yer toss type in da menu below.
 2. Type yer question in da box.
 3. Ya'll get yer fate in yer private cave wiv Putre'z interpretation.
nordic_runes.welcome: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Putre da wise seer iz ready to see yer fate, humie! Nordik runez speak wiv power and truth!
nordic_runes.question_prompt: 🔮 ¡GRRR! What ya wanna know, flabby git? Ask da runez or Putre breakz yer face!
nordic_runes.reading_types: 🔮 Toss types: single, three, cross, runic_cross!
nordic_runes.invalid_type: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Wrong toss type, humie! Uze: single, three, cross, runic_cross!
nordic_runes.no_question: 🔮 ¡GRRR! Ya need to ask a question, stupid humie! I can't read yer empty head!
nordic_runes.reading_saved: 🔮 ¡UHHH! Putre wrote yer fate in da ancient pergaminos!
nordic_runes.error: 🔮 ¡BLEGH! Dark magic broke da bonez! Try again, git!
nordic_runes.help_content:
🔮 **PUTRE DA SEER** 🔮

**What are Runez?**
¡GRRR! Elder Futhark runez are da old symbols of da northern warriorz, uzed by vikingz to see da future and get orderz from da godz!

**Tosses ready:**
• **Single Rune** - Fast guide for a quick question
• **Three Runez** - Past, Present, Future of da warrior
• **Five Cross** - Full battle analysis

**How to uze:**
• Uze orderz: `!runes cast [type] <question>`!
• Example: `!runes cast single What I do today?`!

**Da 24 Elder Futhark Runez:**
Fehu • Uruz • Thurisaz • Ansuz • Raidho • Kenaz • Gebo • Wunjo
Hagalaz • Nauthiz • Isa • Jera • Eiwaz • Perthro • Algiz • Sowilo
Tiwaz • Berkano • Ehwaz • Mannaz • Laguz • Ingwaz • Dagaz • Othala

Each bone haz old wisdom for yer warrior path!
nordic_runes.types_content:
🔮 **OLD RUNE TOSS TYPES** 🔮

**single** - Fast Toss
└ Quick guide for one question - Uzez 1 bone

**three** - Three Runez
└ Past, Present, Future - Uzez 3 bonez

**cross** - Five Runez
└ Full look at yer mess - Uzez 5 bonez

**runic_cross** - Seven Runez
└ Deep look into yer spirit - Uzez 7 bonez

**Examples:**
`!runes cast single what'z my loot?`
`!runes cast three will I die?`

¡GRRR! Pick a toss and ask da bonez!
nordic_runes.runes_list_content:
🔮 **ELDER FUTHARK - OLD BONEZ OF WISDOM** 🔮

**ᚠ FEHU** - Gold & Loot
Meaning: Wealth, Cattle, Stuff
Keywords: gold, abundance, success, money
Interpretation: Material wealth and success in trade.

**ᚢ URUZ** - Primal Strength
Meaning: Auroch, Strength, Power
Keywords: force, courage, power, energy
Interpretation: Raw power and wild energy.

**ᚦ THURISAZ** - Protection
Meaning: Giant, Thor, Shield
Keywords: defense, conflict, change
Interpretation: Protective forces and smashin' conflicts.

**ᚨ ANSUZ** - God Talk
Meaning: God, Odin, Talk
Keywords: wisdom, knowledge, divine message
Interpretation: Divine talk and inspired wisdom.

**ᚱ RAIDHO** - Big Trip
Meaning: Journey, Travel, Move
Keywords: trip, move, change, progress
Interpretation: Travelin' on da road or in yer spirit.

**ᚲ KENAZ** - Torch
Meaning: Torch, Knowledge, Create
Keywords: vision, clarity, inspiration
Interpretation: Illumination and creative fire.

**ᚷ GEBO** - Gift
Meaning: Gift, Partner, Trade
Keywords: gift, swap, balance, harmony
Interpretation: Gifts and balanced partners.

**ᚹ WUNJO** - Joy
Meaning: Joy, Pleasure, Harmony
Keywords: happy, success, joy
Interpretation: Joy and wish fulfillment.

**ᚺ HAGALAZ** - Chaos
Meaning: Hail, Crisis, Change
Keywords: disruption, chaos, transformation
Interpretation: Disruptive change and big mess.

**ᚾ NAUTHIZ** - Need
Meaning: Need, Duty
Keywords: need, discipline, delay
Interpretation: Necessity and patience needed.

**ᛁ ISA** - Ice
Meaning: Ice, Stillness
Keywords: quiet, delay, clarity
Interpretation: Stillness and waitin' for da thaw.

**ᛃ JERA** - Harvest
Meaning: Year, Harvest, Cycle
Keywords: reward, patience, cycle
Interpretation: Natural rewards and cycles.

**ᛇ EIWAZ** - Endurance
Meaning: Yew Tree, Protection
Keywords: endurance, life-death, mysteries
Interpretation: Toughness and life mysteries.

**ᛈ PERTHRO** - Fate
Meaning: Mystery, Luck, Dice
Keywords: fate, secret, chance
Interpretation: Secret destiny and luck.

**ᛉ ALGIZ** - Shield
Meaning: Elk, Protection
Keywords: divine link, defense
Interpretation: Divine protection and shield.

**ᛊ SOWILO** - Sun Victory
Meaning: Sun, Victory, Success
Keywords: sun, honor, achievement
Interpretation: Success and victory.

**ᛏ TIWAZ** - Justice
Meaning: Tyr, Honor, Justice
Keywords: courage, sacrifice, leadership
Interpretation: Justice and brave leadership.

**ᛒ BERKANO** - New Growth
Meaning: Birch, Growth, Birth
Keywords: growth, rebirth, fertility
Interpretation: New beginnings and growth.

**ᛖ EHWAZ** - Trusty Horse
Meaning: Horse, Move, Trust
Keywords: trust, cooperation, progress
Interpretation: Moving forward wiv trust.

**ᛗ MANNAZ** - Humie Link
Meaning: Man, Humanity, Self
Keywords: self, community, relations
Interpretation: Humankind and self-knowin'.

**ᛚ LAGUZ** - Flow
Meaning: Water, Flow, Intuition
Keywords: water, emotions, flow
Interpretation: Emotional water and intuition.

**ᛜ INGWAZ** - Potential
Meaning: Ing, Potential, Fertility
Keywords: hidden energy, growth
Interpretation: Potential and gradual growth.

**ᛞ DAGAZ** - Dawn
Meaning: Day, Dawn, Light
Keywords: clarity, revelation, change
Interpretation: Transformation and light.

**ᛟ OTHALA** - Heritage
Meaning: Home, Legacy
Keywords: home, legacy, ancestors
Interpretation: Home and ancestral loot.
